---
title: "A Framework for Designing Model-Structured Neural Networks for Modeling, Control, and Estimation of Physical Systems"
author:
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "2nd International Conference on Machine Learning Algorithms – ICML-ALGO, India (2025)"
type: presentation
categories:
  - "Presentations"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "2nd International Conference on Machine Learning Algorithms – ICML-ALGO 2025"
venue: "Chitkara University, India"
year: 2025
doi: ""
pdf: presentation.pdf
pub_number: 31
order: -31
image: slide.png
---

## Summary

Presentation by **Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini** at **Chitkara University, India** (2025), for the **2nd International Conference on Machine Learning Algorithms (ICML-ALGO)**. The talk *A Framework for Designing Model-Structured Neural Networks for Modeling, Control, and Estimation of Physical Systems* introduces MSNNs for modeling, control, and estimation, the **Neu4mes** program, the **nnodely** framework, and application examples on autonomous platforms.

::: {.presentation-preview}
![](slide.png){fig-alt="First slide: Framework for designing MSNNs, ICML-ALGO 2025" width=95%}
:::
